name: Governance & Navigation
description: The authoring rulebook and the documentation index that together govern how the docs/ tree is structured, named, versioned, and navigated.

name: Research & Backlog
description: The foundational architecture research, its derived gap-analysis backlog, and the reference-codebase index that maps unresolved gaps to reusable implementation patterns.

name: Subsystem Design
description: The current, pinned v2 design specifications for each simulation subsystem — bill data model, time/session clock, media/opinion model, external event injection, LLM cost model, observability, the politician-skill data contract, and product positioning — each closing one or more gaps from the backlog.

name: Archived Designs
description: Superseded design proposals kept for historical traceability after their content was split and replaced by standalone v2 documents in the Subsystem Design layer.
